steps.title: Read two points from the line
steps.content:
• The line passes through the origin (0,0).
  • It also passes through the point (100,350).

steps.title: Find the slope and write the equation
steps.content:
Compute the slope:
$$m = \frac{350-0}{100-0} = \frac{350}{100} = 3.5$$
Since the line goes through the origin, the y‑intercept b = 0, so the equation is $$y = 3.5x$$.

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 50 rings
steps.content:
Substitute x = 50 into the equation:
$$y = 3.5 \times 50 = 175$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
